violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee observed washing hands in a prep sink or service/mop sink. Observed an employee wash his hands in the 3 compartment sink, because the hand sink was full of dishes.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food were being stored on the freezer floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer bucket measured 0ppm chlorine at the time of inspection.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Gasket on the stand up freezer in the kitchen was completely torn and not providing a seal.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Stack of food containers were sitting in the sink at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned more thoroughly.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the cappuccino machine needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats for nachos were not inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Hole in the wall by the walk in cooler in the back by bag in box pop area, with exposed studs.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mops were stored in bucket and sink, not in a position to dry.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
